Brick of Crude Bronze  
 

Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 15.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Brick of Crude Bronze
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 15.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:100
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 5 sp 0 cp
Submitted By:iventheassassin

Page Updated:Wed Nov 19th, 2025

Expansion: Shadows of Luclin
Average Price: 1pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 4

A Kobold Scout in Toxxulia Forest also dropped one of these for me today.
▲ Page top
Good place
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2005 at 4:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800855878
4 posts
The absolute best place I have found to farm these is the Kobold camps near the newbie area in steamfont. The various Grikbar kobolds drop them fairly frequently and since they don't KoS anyone and don't aid each other fighting, except to heal, these can be taken at around level 4 or 5 depending on class.
▲ Page top
Good place
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2006 at 7:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591904314670
2 posts
Lvl 10 ERU CLR. I just killed a bunch of the [griknab] kobolds and I didn't get a single brick. Looked all over Ak'Anon and none of the merchants had any.
▲ Page top
Good place
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2007 at 9:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592291157305
Scholar
23 posts
I just got 7 drops of Brick of Crude Bronze from tne Kobold Scouts in less than 30 mins--try them.
▲ Page top
Good place
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2007 at 9:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592291157305
Scholar
23 posts
Other kobalds did drop the bronze but at a much slower rate than the Kobold Scouts. Good Hunting !

# Mar 03 2005 at 11:17 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591797878176
Guru
346 posts
I don't believe I have ever seen one drop in Greater Fay, You have to go into Crush bone before these particular Centurions drop them.

Not in Blackburrow
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2004 at 8:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591818433988
View User Forum
2 posts
The Gnolls of Blackburrow Have Crude Iron Ore, not Crude Bronze.

QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2004 at 6:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261380218
1 post
I have bought these from the smithing merchants in Halas
▲ Page top
RE: Merchants sell these
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2004 at 11:18 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Someone sold them to the merchant.

Merchants will resell anything sold to them. Try the same merchant, right after a patch, they will not have it.

Edited, Tue Jun 29 12:19:16 2004
▲ Page top
Drops off Deathfist Templars
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2004 at 9:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591809892785
4 posts

In Nektulos Forest, drops off of Deathfist Templars in addition to the Deathfist Legionnairs and Deathfist Scouts.

Edited, Sat Jun 26 22:11:08 2004
▲ Page top
Additional mobs drops this.
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2004 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262806724
25 posts
I would like to add that the Legionnaires drops this as well in Nektulos, not just the scouts. Descent newb gear, well worth the effort if you aren't a twink or have a lot of pp.
▲ Page top
brick drops
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2004 at 11:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785773996
5 posts
These drop like crazy in crushbone. Cant go wrong farming the bricks there.
▲ Page top
Drops in Blackburrow now Too
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2004 at 2:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758614612
Scholar
41 posts
Killed some scrawny gnolls in BB just a few nights ago and this dropped there as well. Guess this will speed up those newbie quests a little!
▲ Page top
resume
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2004 at 12:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260293733
3 posts
Think it can be found on any death fist orc roaming in EC Orcs Camps, West Freeport newbie zone, Nektulos Orcs Camps, Faydark (Greater and Lower) Orcs Camps, CB.
But as long as you're affilated to Neriak quests.. don't kill in Crushbone or Faydark, they are Indigo Brotherhood Faction which is the Neriak guards faction.
May be completed :p
▲ Page top
Why work for it?
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2004 at 12:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570687144
View User Forum
35 posts
Go to Steamfont and hit all the venders. You can buy tons of them from various venders for very little money.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 23 2003 at 8:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) <edit> accidentally was putting pattern in box with other items, once again assuming bronze bricks from cb work for troll quest. useless post, rate awful please~
crushbone
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2003 at 1:58 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592258082465
1 post
As a lvl 10 Shadow Knight with a pet, crushbone is the place to go for crude bronze, it drops like mad...
▲ Page top
Indigo Brotherhood faction
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2003 at 2:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753088743
32 posts
Hunting crushbone will lower your Indigo Brotherhood faction ... which might not be recommended if you like dealing in Neriak. Just something to think about ... Warrens might be a better destination.
▲ Page top
Newbie Troll Shaman Armor
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2003 at 2:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751181865
4 posts
Ok, now that newbie armor for trolls have been added to the game, is there a mob in Nektulos or closer that now drops this?

I just started playing a troll shaman so if I answer my own question I will post here... :-)
▲ Page top
RE: Newbie Troll Shaman Armor
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2003 at 10:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613953125976
2 posts
try the death fist scouts/templars/legionaires near the zone to EC, they wander by the first split in the road there, they drop the bricks quite regularly!
▲ Page top
RE: Newbie Troll Shaman Armor
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2003 at 12:52 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591782173187
17 posts
the Orcs inside Nektulos now drop this. My 50 cleric took the camp NE of the river line out three times and got one brick. LOL hope something else drops it a little more frequently or it is going to be a long quest.
▲ Page top
Correction?
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2003 at 10:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791111783
17 posts
If you are searching for bronze drops from a Greater Faydark Orc, you will search in vain. I killed more than 50 (at least) and didn't get one drop. When I entered Crushbone, though, I almost immediately recieved drops of this. Is there a way to request a minor update to this page?
▲ Page top
The Warrens
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2003 at 6:53 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592255672695
Sage
202 posts
These can be found in The Warrens also, they are used for Paineel cleric and shadowknight newb armor quests also.
▲ Page top
Blacksmithing
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2002 at 3:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781630096
4 posts
Can you do anything with these bricks other then the quests? Can you combine to make blocks or sheets of bronze?
▲ Page top
RE: Blacksmithing
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2002 at 11:47 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965854161
30 posts
Actually these quests can be used to raise your blacksmithing skill. Got my first point in Blacksmithing with my lvl 19 ranger from these quests. However they are classified as no fail combines.

Calnonric Gregorich, Shaman of the 48th ritual
Jebadae, Ranger of the 19th trail
▲ Page top
RE: Blacksmithing
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2003 at 8:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759042736
34 posts
After doing all of these quests up to the weapon for an Ogre warrior, my Blacksmithing is at 5, so they do keep giving skill-ups, though I do not know what the trivial might be. And no, I did not do any training or other combines that might affect Blacksmithing.
▲ Page top
RE: Blacksmithing
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2002 at 2:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751736570
Scholar
98 posts
No. These are in the game just for the quests. There's no known blacksmith recipies that use them.
